sections.title: Attempting to open the north-western or south-eastern door to the Wizards' Guild without the 66 Magic requirement

lines.speaker: Wizard Distentor
lines.text: You need a magic level of 66. The magical energy in here is unsafe for those below that level.

sections.title: Attempting to open the north-eastern or south-western door to the Wizards' Guild without the 66 Magic requirement

lines.speaker: Wizard Distentor
lines.text: You need a magic level of 66 for admittance to the guild. The magical energy inside the guild is unsafe for anyone below that level. For any other business please ring for attention.

lines.speaker: Wizard Distentor
lines.text: What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing thanks, I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teleport me to the Rune Essence?
